news.headline: UK Treasury Minister Jones: Our absolute focus is securing growth.
Investing £130 million/year in tech for UK schools could lead to £8.7 billion economic benefit in 10 yrs - Pearson & Cebr.
news.summary: In London on January 9, 2025, it was reported that an estimated annual investment of around £130 million in technology for schools for the next ten years could result in an economic gain of up to £8.7 billion for the UK. It is projected that for every £1 spent on technology in schools, there could be a return of up to £7.90.

news.headline: UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: This is not austerity.
Ship & Boat Building Market to hit US$527.61B by 2034; 11.1% CAGR growth forecasted. Increased demand in multiple maritime sectors. Shipyards in Asia and Europe booming, creating job opportunities.
news.summary: The global Ship & Boat Building Market is projected to reach US$183.69 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 11.1% between 2024 and 2034, reaching a valuation of US$527.61 billion by the end of 2034. The industry is experiencing significant growth due to increased demand in various maritime sectors, including container ships, specialized vessels for offshore wind farms and LNG transportation, cruise ships, military vessels, and fishing fleet modernization. Shipyards in Asia, especially in China, South Korea, and Japan, are reporting full order books extending into 2026. European shipbuilders are also seeing increased demand for specialized vessels and luxury yachts. Job opportunities and technological innovations in automation and environmental sustainability are on the rise. The industry growth reflects the crucial role of maritime transport in global commerce and various economic sectors. Key takeaways include the South Korean market expanding at a CAGR of 12.9%, the East Asian market reaching US$446.42 billion by 2034, and the Mexican market advancing at a 5.6% CAGR in North America by 2034.

news.headline: Wishpond files patent for enhanced state manager technology to improve real-time interactions with SalesCloser AI virtual agents.
news.summary: A patent application has been filed by Wishpond for its advanced enhanced state manager technology in Vancouver, BC. This new technology is aimed at enhancing interactions with SalesCloser AI virtual agents by adapting to real-time cues and recalling past conversations. This innovation is expected to significantly improve complex conversations and elevate the user experience.

news.headline: RBC and Cohere team up to create secure generative AI for financial services. Partnership aims to develop cutting-edge solutions.
news.summary: In Toronto on January 9, 2025, RBC (known as TSX: RY and NYSE: RY) disclosed a collaboration with Cohere, a top company in security and privacy-centric enterprise AI. Together, they are working on creating and securely implementing an enterprise generative AI (genAI) solution specifically designed for the financial services sector.

news.headline: Target is increasing its wellness products with 2,000 new items, over 600 exclusive, most under $10. Discovery journey expanded.
news.summary: Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) unveiled over 600 exclusive wellness products available only at Target stores. The range includes functional beverages, hair health essentials, and innovative wellness technology. This launch aims to assist consumers in exploring new options throughout their wellness journeys. The announcement was made in Minneapolis on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Toys for Tots reflects on 2024, brought smiles and hope to millions of kids nationwide. Renewed commitment for the new year.
news.summary: In Triangle, Virginia on January 9, 2025, the Marine Corps Reserve Toys for Tots Program looks back on the impact made in 2024 by bringing smiles and hope to millions of disadvantaged children nationwide. Through the generosity of donors, including X amount of toys donated, the program helped spread joy during the holiday season.

news.headline: Perigon Wealth Management strengthens ties with Goldman Sachs, gains new custodian for RIAs.
news.summary: A recent announcement states that Perigon Wealth Management, LLC has added a new custodian to its services, providing Registered Investment Advisors (RIAs) with increased flexibility and choices. The firm, which has been experiencing rapid growth, operates offices nationwide. The addition of this custodian is aimed at streamlining services for RIAs, facilitating easier management of approximately...

news.headline: FusionIQ had a successful year in 2024, winning three industry awards and appointing Sloan Shanahan as Chief Revenue Officer.
news.summary: FusionIQ, a prominent wealthtech company based in Woburn, Massachusetts, declared on January 9, 2025, the appointment of Sloan Shanahan as their Chief Revenue Officer in an effort to enhance growth and innovation within the company. The firm, known for its cloud-based wealth management solutions, experienced notable success in reaching major milestones.

news.headline: HBC & HBC Financial Services merge with Coldstream, bringing total assets to $11.1 billion. Expansion in Pacific Northwest.
news.summary: A company is further expanding in the Pacific Northwest by partnering with a Seattle-based Certified Public Accountant and Registered Investment Advisor. This collaboration has led to Coldstream's assets under advisement reaching $11.1 billion. The partnership was announced on January 9, 2025, in Seattle.

news.headline: 2025 homebuyers prioritize move-in-ready homes, willing to compromise on desired features. Key features include bedrooms, garage, en-suite; proximity to work is important.
news.summary: With soaring home prices and a scarcity of housing options, potential homebuyers are willing to make concessions to secure a property. Key factors in deciding on a home include the number of bedrooms, availability of a garage, and a primary en-suite bathroom. Additionally, being close to work is crucial for many buyers. A gourmet or modern kitchen and a well-kept home are also significant considerations for individuals looking to purchase.

news.headline: Anton Chashchin wins Mastercard EDGE 2024 Award for FacePass-AMIO innovation; a highlight of 2024. Affero start of 2025.
news.summary: In London on January 9, 2025, the Mastercard EDGE Award for FacePass-AMIO developed by Anton Chashchin continues to be a standout accomplishment from 2024. Anton Chashchin, recognized as an advisor, philanthropist, and innovative business figure, received the prestigious Mastercard EDGE 2024 Award for his contributions.

news.headline: Panera introduces new Asiago Bagel Stacks in 3 varieties for $7.99, also free bagel for MyPanera guests.
news.summary: To celebrate National Bagel Day, MyPanera customers can now receive a complimentary bagel when they purchase the new Asiago Bagel Stack at Panera Bread. The promotion is valid for a limited time and allows guests to enjoy the new sandwich. The Asiago Bagel Stack is part of a new menu item at Panera, offering customers a flavorful option. This promotion is available to MyPanera members and is set to run until Jan. 9, 2025. Don't miss out on this opportunity to savor a delicious combination of flavors with Panera's latest offering.

news.headline: 24 Hour Fitness provides full club access to Los Angeles residents affected by wildfires. Open locations offer space for recovery.
news.summary: Amidst the destructive wildfires in Southern California, 24 Hour Fitness facilities in the area are providing shelter for the community. This initiative aims to assist individuals in regaining stability during this challenging period. The facilities in CARLSBAD, Calif. have opened their doors for those seeking respite. This gesture showcases solidarity with the affected individuals in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Beyond Identity launches new channel program to enhance partner business growth, appoints Joel Vinocur as Senior Director.
news.summary: Today, Beyond Identity, a top cybersecurity company, has appointed Joel Vinocur as Senior Director of Channels to enhance partner profitability. The firm is renowned for its robust identity and access management (IAM) platform. The announcement comes as Beyond Identity unveils its latest channel initiative in New York on January 9, 2025. This move aims to further solidify partnerships and drive revenue growth.

news.headline: Realtor.com predicts top markets for first-time homebuyers in 2025 - Harrisburg, Penn. leading the list. #RealEstate #2025MarketPrediction
news.summary: For individuals new to homeownership, Harrisburg, Pennsylvania should be the primary location to consider. A recent report has revealed that in 2025, first-time homebuyers should focus their search on the Mid-Atlantic region and Florida. This information was shared on January 9, 2025 from Santa Clara, California. The report provides insights on the top destinations for new homeowners, with Harrisburg standing out as a promising location for those looking to start their homeowner journey.

news.headline: BJ’s Wholesale Club opens new Maryville, TN location on Jan 17, 2025, its fourth in state, with Gas station.
news.summary: BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) has declared the opening of its new club in Maryville, Tennessee, on January 17, 2025. Situated at 101 Foothills Mall Drive, this will be BJ’s fourth club in Tennessee. The adjacent BJ’s Gas service will commence operations on January 9, featuring competitive fuel prices and additional savings via the BJ’s Fuel Saver Program. BJ’s aims to provide exceptional value on daily necessities within a convenient shopping destination. Members will have opportunities to save on a variety of items, including fresh produce.

news.headline: Oxford Cancer Analytics secures $11M in Series A funding for early lung cancer detection and treatments.
news.summary: An artificial intelligence company based in Oxford, England and Toronto has successfully secured $11 million in Series A funding. The company, Oxford Cancer Analytics, aims to revolutionize early detection of lung cancer and facilitate curative treatments.

news.headline: Avelo Airlines ranked #1 in on-time performance in 2024, with 2.4M customers flown, surpassing a total of 6M.
news.summary: In 2024, Avelo Airlines achieved the highest on-time performance ranking in the U.S. while also having the lowest number of flight cancellations compared to other airlines. Avelo successfully served 2.4 million customers throughout the year, showcasing a remarkable overall tally of 6 million customers since their inaugural flight. Avelo's operational excellence positions them as a leading airline entering 2025.

news.headline: Investment firm Maple Park Capital Partners acquires majority stake in Rita's Italian Ice & Frozen Custard to fuel expansion.
news.summary: A significant investment has been made by Maple Park Capital Partners in Rita’s Italian Ice & Frozen Custard, with the former acquiring a majority stake in the latter. This move marks a substantial development in the thriving partnership between the two entities, signaling growth and expansion opportunities. The exact financial details of the investment have not been disclosed publicly.

news.headline: Cardano price drops due to declining user activity and strong resistance, with bears targeting $0.76.
news.summary: Today, Cardano is experiencing a decline in user engagement and facing strong resistance from its overhead costs. Bears in the market are aiming to push ADA prices down towards $0.76.

news.headline: Kian Capital invests in Eden Brothers, leading home garden e-commerce retailer, founded in 2009, based in Asheville, NC.
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C., Kian Capital Partners, a private investment firm focusing on the lower-middle-market, has successfully acquired Eden Brothers, a fast-growing e-commerce retailer renowned for its flower seeds and bulbs catering to gardening enthusiasts across the country. Established in 2009 by CEO Sabine Randon, a former luxury retail executive, Eden Brothers is based in Asheville, North Carolina. This strategic acquisition was accomplished in collaboration with the company's management team.

news.headline: Clear Channel to sell Europe-North segment to Bauer Media Group's subsidiary for $625 million.
news.summary: In a press release on January 9, 2025, Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCO) revealed plans to sell its Europe-North segment to Bauer Media Group's subsidiary, Bauer Radio Limited. This definitive agreement marks a significant move for the Company, reflecting its strategic decision in the market. The deal involves the sale of key businesses within the segment, highlighting the Company's shift in focus. This transaction signifies a significant development in the Company's operations, with specific details such as financial terms and impact yet to be disclosed.

news.headline: ONCare Alliance adds East Texas Hematology Oncology to its network in Lufkin, TX, welcoming more independent oncology practices.
news.summary: A network called ONCare Alliance, focusing on supporting independent oncology practices, recently welcomed East Texas Hematology Oncology to their organization. East Texas Hematology Oncology, situated in Lufkin, Texas, has officially joined the growing network. The addition of this practice marks a significant milestone for ONCare Alliance as they continue to expand, aiming to enhance their services and reach.

news.headline: PayPoint plc announces director and PDMR shareholding.
Genenta enhances partnership with AGC Biologics to improve cell therapy production.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 1.5% compared to the same period last year. The number of jobless individuals has also surged to 2.5 million, reflecting a significant uptick of 600,000 people. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 12% since the beginning of the year, indicating a challenging job market for job seekers. Experts attribute this rise in unemployment to various factors, including the economic slowdown, company closures, and the impact of the global pandemic. Despite government efforts to stimulate job growth and provide assistance to those affected, the situation remains grim for many individuals struggling to secure employment.

news.headline: Ultimovacs ASA announces major holdings notification, $51.7 million private placement, and approval of business combination with Zelluna Immunotherapy AS.
news.summary: Oslo, 9 January 2025: Ultimovacs ASA recently disclosed significant updates. Firstly, on 17 December 2024, they announced plans for a business merger with Zelluna Immunotherapy AS, along with a private placement that secured around NOK 51.7 million. Secondly, on 9 January 2025, an extraordinary general meeting of the Company gave the green light to crucial decisions linked to the Business Combination and the Private Placement. Collectively termed as the "Transactions," these developments mark a pivotal phase for the Company.

news.headline: UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: There is no need for any emergency intervention by the finance minister.

Prosafe SE extends Safe Zephyrus contract with Petrobras until Sept 2027 with an increase in fuel allowance to 25m3/day. Total value USD 109.7 million. CEO Terje Askvig notes vessel's success in supporting Petrobras.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Prosafe announced a contract extension with Petrobras to provide the Safe Zephyrus semi-submersible vessel for offshore safety and maintenance support in Brazil. The original 650-day firm period ending in February 2025 has been prolonged by 954 days, now running until September 2027. The fuel allowance has also been raised from 20m3 to 25m3 per day for this extension. The contract extension amounts to around USD 109.7 million. Terje Askvig, CEO of Prosafe, highlighted the vessel's strong performance in supporting safety and maintenance for Petrobras in the Buzios business unit offshore Brazil. This extension reflects the growing demand in the region for high-spec units, positioning Prosafe to expand its market share. For more details, contact: [contact information not provided].

news.headline: Karolinska Development's AnaCardio raises SEK 205 million, positive Phase 1b data of AC01, moving to Phase 2a in Q1 2025.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Karolinska Development AB disclosed that its portfolio firm, AnaCardio, has successfully raised SEK 205 million in a series A extension funding round. Additionally, positive outcomes were revealed from the initial segment of a Phase 1b/2a trial of AC01 in individuals suffering from heart failure and reduced ejection fraction. The remaining part of the study (phase 2a) is anticipated to commence in the initial quarter of 2025.

news.headline: UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: Public spending will be in line with what was set out in the budget.
UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: We have set tough new fiscal rules that are non negotiable
Solana set for growth with rise of US ETF and retail interest; expected to surpass Bitcoin and Ether by 2025.
news.summary: In 2025, Solana is poised to surpass Bitcoin and Ethereum, fueled by a projected US-based spot SOL ETF and upbeat retail profit forecasts. This could signify a significant shift, highlighting Solana's potential to outperform the two leading cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: UK Treasury Minister Jones: Only the OBR forecast can predict the impact of gilt moves on fiscal headroom.
UK Treasury Minister Jones: The government does not comment on specific market movements.
UK Treasury Minister Jones: UK financial markets continue to function in an orderly way.
UK Treasury Minister Jones: It is normal for the price of gilts to vary.
Banks borrow £51.4bln in BoE short-term repo operation.
Costco sees strong December sales with a 9.9% rise to $27.52B in net sales; expects a 7% jump in January core sales.
news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp reported a strong 9.9% increase in net sales to $27.52 billion for the five weeks ending Jan. 5, compared to $25.03 billion last year. Analysts at Telsey Advisory Group predict a 7% year-on-year jump in January 2025 core sales for Costco. They also anticipate a 5% increase in January comparable sales, and a 7% increase in core merchandise sales. TAG projects a 6.5% increase in U.S. sales, excluding forex and gas price changes. The analysts expect Costco to perform well in the coming months despite the uncertain operating environment.

news.headline: UK economy concerns hit retailers, leading to falling investor confidence. #Retailnews
Netcompany has made transactions related to its share buyback program. No specific numbers mentioned.
Objectway enters MENA region, secures first client: Kuwait Financial Centre "Markaz". Expanding business prospects.
news.summary: Objectway, a leading company in asset management, has recently made its debut in the MENA region by acquiring its initial client, the Kuwait Financial Centre “Markaz”. Markaz is a well-known investment firm operating in the Middle East and North Africa. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for Objectway as it expands its presence in the region and demonstrates its growth strategy. This move marks Objectway's first step into the MENA market, reflecting a strategic decision in line with the company's vision for expansion.

news.headline: Grünenthal appoints Prof. Dr. Uli Brödl as CSO, with over 15 years of industry experience, effective 01 February 2025.
news.summary: In AACHEN, Germany, on January 9, 2025, pharmaceutical company Grünenthal revealed that Prof. Dr. Uli Brödl will be taking on the position of Chief Scientific Officer (CSO) and Member of the Corporate Executive Board starting from February 1, 2025. With over 15 years of industry expertise, Dr. Brödl will be bringing his wealth of experience to his new role.

news.headline: Majority of Bitcoin holdings in the US surpass offshore entities by 65%, per CryptoQuant.
86% of consumers opt in for SMS marketing, seeking instant, tailored communication. - Jan. 9, 2025. EZ Texting report.
news.summary: The popularity of SMS Marketing has reached new heights, with a staggering 86% of consumers choosing to participate and showing a strong demand for immediate, personalized messaging. This data comes from EZ Texting, a top text marketing service provider for businesses, based on their recent 2025 Consumer Texting report. The findings highlight the growing trend of customers preferring SMS communication, underscoring the importance of businesses adapting to meet these preferences for effective marketing strategies in today's market.

news.headline: Cyrus Biotech chooses CYR212 as clinical candidate for chronic autoimmune diseases like Myasthenia Gravis.
news.summary: Seattle-based Cyrus Biotech revealed that CYR212, their protease, has been chosen as the clinical candidate for the treatment of chronic autoimmune diseases caused by IgG antibodies.

news.headline: Coinbase alerts users of CFTC subpoena linked to Polymarket, may send account data in response to the request.
news.summary: Coinbase may potentially have to disclose specific user account details to the CFTC as per a subpoena linked to Polymarket.

news.headline: Acer's 2024 revenues reach NT$264.71 billion, up 9.7% with non-PC businesses contributing 28.3%. Q4 revenues at NT$66.12 billion, up 4.7% YoY.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Acer Inc. reported preliminary consolidated revenues reaching NT$66.12 billion, reflecting a 4.7% year-on-year increase. This marks the company's sixth consecutive quarter of year-on-year growth. For the entire fiscal year 2024, Acer's preliminary consolidated revenues totaled NT$264.71 billion, up by 9.7% compared to the previous year.

news.headline: US Govt sells 69,370 seized Bitcoins from Silk Road, worth $6.5 billion after getting DOJ approval.
news.summary: The US government has been authorized to sell around 69,370 Bitcoins seized from Silk Road, a darknet website, with an estimated value of $6.5 billion. This decision was approved by a federal judge due to the cryptocurrency's price instability, as reported on Wednesday. The Department of Justice pushed for the sale of these assets, however, they have not confirmed this information in response to media inquiries.
